creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Ponte from comment #10)

Oh, sorry, I just noticed the date of the report. I wonder if you were actually getting smacked by the aforementioned ABI breakage, which I only MFC'd to stable/13 here: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/contrib/pf/libevent?h=stable/13&id=e0ad785a5d29d33ff8f382ddf055950444cc92e2 (2021/04/01) -- in hindsight, maybe that's worth an EN.
